stories.title: Spain won't panic yet about Cape Verde draw, but t...
stories.summary: Spain have a history of starting slowly at World Cups before finding their form, but nobody -- not even them -- expected to open 2026 with a draw against tiny Cape Verde.

stories.title: Spain won't panic after draw with 'inferior' CV
stories.summary: Coach Luis de la Fuente insisted that tournament favourites Spain won't panic after being held to a 0-0 draw by underdogs Cape Verde.

stories.title: UFC's Hokit disparages Michelle Obama at WH
stories.summary: UFC fighter Josh Hokit targeted Michelle Obama during his postfight comments at Sunday's UFC White House event, saying the former First Lady "is a man."

stories.title: Pulisic trains apart; Poch says U.S. star 'good'
stories.summary: United States men's national team attacker Christian Pulisic trained off to the side at Monday's practice session as he attempts to recover from a calf injury he first sustained in training last week.

stories.title: Izzo 'disgusted' by leadership overhaul at MSU
stories.summary: Tom Izzo expressed his displeasure with the leadership changes surrounding him at Michigan State, calling on the school's alumni to do something about it.
